Item-cm_transactions_help
options:
This tab is system-managed. Use these standard views to see activity for an Item:
  • Stock Ledger (filter by Item)
  • Stock Balance (filter by Item)
  • Item Prices (filter by Item)
  • Stock Allocations (Stock Reservation Entry)
  • Stock Entries
  • Sales Orders and Purchase Orders (filter by Item)
